programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A used bullet hidden in their house by a new Hart employee leads to a cat-and-mouse evening with a murderer

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: An elderly man asks the pair to find his young wife who has disappeared mysteriously but when Cagney and Lacey start digging they find the wife is not who she said she was

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Starsky and Hutch run afoul of federal agent Bettin when his scheme to collar crime kingpin Dombarris puts back on the streets the serial rapist Jojo a psychopath Starsky and Hutch are determined to put away for good

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: During Caitlins sorority reunion things go bad when a kidnapping is attempted

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Operatino Repo
programme.desc: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist Lyndah and Froy head to the Hollywood Hills to find a luxury sedan

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team gets back to work but have their anger management sessions had any effect Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls whove got the skills to protect their car Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when theyre forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients and Matt Lou and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: Addams 209
programme.desc: Addams 209

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E16
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E16

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E35
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E35

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur bets an old college rival 5 bills that Ed can out-jump his horse He has second thoughts after he realizes that 5 bills equals 500

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol and Wilbur convert the barn into a temporary polling precinct so Ed wants to vote too

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is kidnapped by a band of renegade Indians who then escape into the hills of New Mexico A frantic Lucas takes out after them determined to get his son back

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A young boy and his sister victims of an abusive father come to the conclusion that the only way to protect themselves from further abuse is to kill him

programme.title: Gunsmoke S07E12 Ninas Revenge
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S07E12 Ninas Revenge

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Cartwrights join to help mystical blacksmith Sam Hill save the land his drunk sea-dog father signed away to an old enemy discover the circumstances behind his mothers death and solve the mystery of why a tropical tree flourishes in spite of cold Nevada winters

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: While at the Mermaid Bar Agent James West is shot with a blow dart by a woman disguised as a Mermaid When he comes to West finds himself aboard a ship where he meets an unusual woman with a mysterious compact Suddenly the ship is attacked by a fire breathing dragon and ship explodes After floating to shore Jim meets Arte and they unveil the secrets of a new weapon a dragon-like torpedo attracted to a homing device in a womans compact Together they must find the weapon before a government ship loaded with a cargo of explosives arrives in the San Francisco harbor

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a girl mysteriously disappears from school Friday and Gannon try to find her and they find out that there are more questions than answers One question is was she abducted by a man named Harper

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An old Vaudevillian finds 9 one thousand dollar bills on the street He uses one to buy his friends drinks at a dive The next morning a private detective claims that the money was lost by a big time gambler and pressures him to give it back he does and discovers that the detective was a con man

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A computer scientist appalled to discover that his chauffeur was actually Dr Kimble uses his new state-of-the-art computer to assist Gerard and predict Kimbles movements from city to city

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Janet is married to a doctor whos married to his work She wants to live her life with passion danger and romance like Fuchsia Monroe a soap opera character she watches religiously When her television goes haywire her friend Louise convinces her to get cable With her husband unresponsive to her needs she begins a steamy affair with the cable guy

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Two con artist attempt to steal the fortune of a rich man they accidentally killed by creating a fake seance for his blind wife but not everything goes to plan

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A model desperate for fame hooks up with a crazed fashion photographer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Overbearing control freak Jeremy and his long-suffering wife Julie are a squabbling young rich couple who encounter unexpected trouble in the form of a scruffy biker and his pregnant girlfriend while embarking on a road trip to Sunnyvale Can a surprise journey through time enable the obsessive Jeremy to successfully avert a tragic disaster

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric jumps a train in his quest for Skorzeny He finds a band of hobos who are suspicious of him when one of their members has his throat slit while they sleep

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: When a werewolf murders some homeless kids Eric tracks it to a mall and finds a homeless girl living there He runs out of silver bullets and fashions a silver crossbow arrow slaying the werewolf Only to find that its the homeless girl

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A murderer who meets his victims through a dating service stalks Natalie and she learns of Nicks secret past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack must track down an evil statue that causes men to kill the women they love

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A married woman is into watching game shows She gets onto one which becomes a nightmare wherein if she answers correctly her husband dies She wins 1000000 then travels back in time warning herself to get rid of the money or else her husband will die

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate is expecting some women from the Garden Club to visit and is nervous about them asking her to join Of course Grampa makes the wrong impression and Kate is sure that she will not get the invite

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A new female neighbor makes a bad impression on Grampa by being better than him at almost everything

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ goes from riding a rig to riding horseback when he helps a young Indian brave protect the regions wild horses from a corrupt rancher

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While Hogan detains a German general during an Allied offensive a Gestapo officer looks into Stalag 13s perfect escape record

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans latest underground contacts are secretly German spies

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Under the impression that Parker is an Ace Gunner Binghamton wagers one of his most prized possessions that Parker can out-shoot an arrogant Captains best gunner

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A lovely French girl agrees to help the guys out in a plan to raise expense money for the birth of Christys child

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer makes friends with a hillbilly named Branch

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Troy is captured while trying to make contact with the underground in a small village At stake is micro-film information about a new type of bomb the Germans have developed

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2 Tanna after a series of rigorous torture sessions involving hypnosis and high-frequency noise intended to program him into killing Roth manages to trick Remick and his henchmen into thinking that their efforts were successful Unknown to them Tanna has used a candle to make earplugs and a splinter in his mouth to block pain impulses used in the sessions Giving him a rifle loaded with wax bullets Tanna aims and fires at what hes led to believe is Roth but is simply another test as the floating body turns out to be that of a double and is alive and well Shortly after this federal agents arrive and question Tanna who learns that he and The Commission have been under surveillance all along and that Roth has been in protective custody and not in any danger Though initially enraged at the thought of agents sitting idly by while he was tortured Tanna agrees to help in their investigation to bring Remick and his men to justice

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Two chemists at one of Jonathans subsidiaries have developed a new hallucinogen and their supervisor is killed when he tries to report them to Jonathan

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael breaks up with Stephanie after Dick tells him not to always let her have her way

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry after watching Jeopardy decides to try and get his high school equivalency So he asks Dick to help him When he fails the test Dick goes to the teacher and convinces him to give Larry another try and to test him as if he was on Jeopardy And Joanna upon seeing the Inns rating in the Vermont guide go down sets out to restore it So she drives George and Stephanie crazy

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Worried about bickering in various departments because of budget cuts General Craig tries to bolster camp comradery with games

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans body conducts electricity after he is struck by lightning with a bowling ball in his hand But when The Professor tries to remove the bowling ball from Gilligans hand a second lightning strike makes him invisible

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: A monster resembling a wolf is attacking and killing teenage runaways who live in an abandoned building which is condemned after being demolished by a series of earthquakes Mitch and Ryan investigate and discover from hair samples from the monster that resemble a mythical wolf man from Yugoslavia named Zargtha

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matts offer to buy into the company the team is back in action but there are still some unanswered questions Sonia Lyndah and Froy interrupt a rich kids brunch party to take away his ride Matt and Lyndah attempt to repo an unusual vehicle from a man who thinks hes Uncle Sam and Lou and Matt are in a losing match with an unruly gang of jacked-up rugby players

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: Fortress

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Family friend Swamp Molly asks Bo and Luke to deliver a load of moonshine but the shipment is really illegal firearms

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Artifacts believed to be Taelon are found in South America Renee and Liam try to beat Sandoval to the source to determine the importance of the found pieces

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A revolutionary med cell is created that could save countless lives But fearing that the Morthrens could turn it into something deadly the Blackwood team tries to get their hands on it first Meanwhile Malzor desperately tries to acquire it to heal a dying Mana his second-in-command

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A rock singer tries to run away from the consequences of the morbid overtones in the lyrics of his songs after two fans committ suicide to the suggestions therein

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Can Will escape the wrath of guardians to a lost Mayan temple within the swamp when he is forced to be an unwilling guide

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alien glyphs appear on all of Alphas screens Koenig sends an Eagle to investigate The Eagle is lost and the pilot is taken over by a huge alien Space Brain using him as a channel to make the Alphans do its bidding Koenig has to destroy it

programme.title: Wes Cravens Night Visions
programme.desc: A cop teams up with a psychic to track down a serial killer

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Alcoholic Off Joe Landers accidentally gets his partner killed and clumsily tries to cover it up as Stone and Keller work their way to the truth

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis one of the countrys richest financier

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate abuse to babies One mother claims her child fell down the stairs but they find the father beat the child The baby dies The parents never wanted the child

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon come up with the idea of using dogs to sniff out marijuana smugglers Theyll have to find a dog and demonstrate it works while enduring their colleagues skepticism of the wild idea

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Playing a kind of Prof Higgins to his Eliza Doolittle Kimble schools an uneducated woman while her boyfriend works his next big score An undercover policeman originally shadowing the gangster-boyfriend takes an interest in Kimble

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath arrives in a dying desert town only to find himself a visitor in a madhouse His hosts are five deranged people who play bizarre and deadly games with their infrequent guests Heaths role in their hellish fantasy the accused--on trial for rape and murder

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne interrupts a stagecoach attack but when it crashes he is left to take care of the lone survivor - a baby Cheyenne learns that a land grabber murdered to get his claim then Cheyenne must protect the dead mans heir - the baby

programme.title: Gamera War of the Monsters
programme.desc: Prehistoric monster Gamera returns to wreak havoc on Japan American version of the classic kaiju film Gamera vs Barugon

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: The Savage Bees
programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: The Presidents Plane Is Missing

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 33 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Mike Geib vs. Thomas Richardson; Steven Arens vs. Ryan Proulx; Lynell House vs. Victoria Chadwick.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview
programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Two planets one full of people are on a collision course Gillian devises a potion to make the Monster Minds on the deserted planet grow only on one side The unevenly distributed weight will cause the planet to split avoiding a collision

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and all the wizards of the universe gather together to combine their powers in the orb which then receives strength from the night moon Saw Boss has captured the night moon and hopes to capture power for evil doing

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM plans to steal currency from the Philadelphia Mint using a gravity ray which can melt anything in their path and also produce impenetrable crystal armor for their vehicles

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals a seemingly worthless painting from a home in Rio De Janeiro Matt Trakker calls in the MASK team after learning the painting may contain a secret map to lost Nazi treasure

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Lana is happy to be reunited with her long-lost brother Lyle on the distant video world of Tetris Kevin and Lyle join forces to stop Mother Brain from taking Tetriss power source the Sacred Square

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A football game against Dr Wilys robot masters brings acquaintances of Kevin from high school to Videoland The N team ought to play good and win because the prize is the throne of Videoland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Sheila saves a girl named Karina from a magic trap but Karina turns evil Meanwhile the kids are looking for a pair of magic rings that might send them home not realizing that Karina has one of the rings

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids encounter a race of tiny friendly dragons who are being hunted by an evil king By saving the dragons they may find their way home

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw steals the big red ruby of India to use in his superlaser to destroy US communications satellites

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
